title: Door Jam
description: Rusty copper doors tend to jam
body:
# Door Jam

This mod makes copper doors, trapdoors, and chests have a chance of not opening when clicked, to make them more unique from wooden doors & trapdoors.

<iframe width="1280" height="721" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/X3LAcRlaenM" title="Door Jam - Minecraft Mod Showcase" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>  

Redstone powering and waxed blocks are unaffected.

| Oxidization | Jam chance |
| ----------- | ------------ |
| None | 0% |
| Exposed | 25% |
| Weathered | 50% |
| Oxidized | 100% |

It works server-side only, but doors appear to flicker. This effect can be avoided by installing on the client as well.
